---
title: "06. 虚实、示形与诱导控制"
subtitle: "Weakness, Strength, and Adversarial Signaling"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 6
categories: [sunzi, cultural, omega]
description: "How 虚实 turns observation itself into a battlefield by controlling what the enemy can reconstruct from surface signals."
---

**Chapters:** 始计第一, 虚实第六  
**Omega Directions:** `spectral theory`, `rate-distortion information theory`, `fold operator`

{{< include articles/category_06_weakness_strength_adversarial_signaling.md >}}

---

[Back to Sunzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
